_meta.note: Daemon-backed session stop (omni P1). Terminates the session shell (graceful then forced via the PTY runtime) and reports the terminal state. Idempotent: stopping an already-terminal or unknown session returns the terminal state with a bounded reason, never an error. TB-7: session_id is opaque (copy verbatim, e.g. ses_<32hex>).

unsupported_platform_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnsupportedPlatform]: persistent shell sessions are not available on this platform yet (PTY/ConPTY pending)

invariants: stop attempts a graceful terminate before a forced kill
success payload reports the terminal state + a bounded terminal_reason
stopping an unknown or already-terminal session is idempotent (terminal state, never a synthetic running result)
